description: Environment variable fragment for the env assembler. Union-merge with other stages into .env.local.example; every var here is referenced by code generated in this stage.

vars.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
vars.description: Service-role key — billing writes from webhooks/checkout ONLY. Never NEXT_PUBLIC_.

vars.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
vars.source: zo_config.stripe_test_secret_key (test first; live only on explicit approval)

vars.name: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
vars.source: Generated when Deploy Mind creates the webhook endpoint
vars.description: Webhook signing secret for /api/webhooks/stripe signature verification.

vars.name: STRIPE_PRICE_PRO_MONTHLY
vars.source: Deploy Mind (Stripe price id, $9/mo); mirror into renewalradar_plans.stripe_price_id_monthly

vars.name: STRIPE_PRICE_PRO_YEARLY
vars.source: Deploy Mind (Stripe price id, $89/yr); mirror into renewalradar_plans.stripe_price_id_yearly

vars.name: STRIPE_PRICE_BUSINESS_MONTHLY
vars.source: Deploy Mind (Stripe price id, $29/mo); mirror into renewalradar_plans.stripe_price_id_monthly

vars.name: STRIPE_PRICE_BUSINESS_YEARLY
vars.source: Deploy Mind (Stripe price id, $290/yr); mirror into renewalradar_plans.stripe_price_id_yearly

vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
vars.description: Canonical app URL for checkout success/cancel and portal return URLs.

vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY
vars.description: Not required: hosted Stripe Checkout redirects are used; no client-side Stripe.js in this build.
